behavior_modifiers.name: rushed
behavior_modifiers.description: Types fast, doesn't wait for saves to complete, clicks away quickly. Tests race conditions and unsaved state.

behavior_modifiers.name: careful
behavior_modifiers.description: Reads every page fully, checks rendered output after every save, verifies content via GitHub API. Catches stale render bugs.

behavior_modifiers.name: confused
behavior_modifiers.description: Clicks wrong buttons, navigates to wrong pages, uses search with typos, tries to save without filling required fields. Tests error handling.

behavior_modifiers.name: thorough
behavior_modifiers.description: Fills every optional field, adds long descriptions, uploads multiple images, creates deeply nested content. Tests limits.

behavior_modifiers.name: mobile
behavior_modifiers.description: Uses 375x812 viewport throughout. Tests responsive layout, touch targets, bottom nav.

behavior_modifiers.name: adversarial
behavior_modifiers.description: Enters HTML tags, script injections, extremely long strings (500+ chars), emoji-heavy names, Unicode edge cases. Tests input sanitization.

behavior_modifiers.name: impatient
behavior_modifiers.description: Double-clicks save buttons, refreshes mid-save, navigates away during upload, back-button after form submit. Tests interruption handling.

behavior_modifiers.name: explorer
behavior_modifiers.description: Tries URL manipulation (?doc=nonexistent), opens pages in unexpected order, deep-links to items that were just deleted. Tests error states.

scenario_cards: New lab member first day: Create notebook folder, first entry, find a protocol, check inventory
Ordering day: Review dashboard needs ordering, check each item, update inventory counts
Experiment day: Follow protocol start to finish, record in notebook with images, track samples
Lab meeting prep: Review all project pages, check recent notebooks, prepare bulletin
Equipment move: Update lab map positions for 3 items that moved shelves
Protocol revision: Duplicate a protocol, modify 5 steps, save, compare with original
Sample QC review: Filter sample tracker by status, check notes for failed samples
End of week: Review all notebooks from this week, check waste containers are logged
Grant report: Compile data from projects, sample tracker counts, protocol list
Emergency: Reagent spill — find SDS via inventory, check waste disposal protocol
Bulk data entry: Add 10 samples in rapid succession with varying fields
Cross-reference deep dive: Start from a protocol, follow every wikilink, check each destination
Multi-tab chaos: Open 3 pages, edit all simultaneously, save in random order
Stale data hunt: Save something, immediately reload, check if content matches
Image-heavy notebook: Upload 5 images in one entry, annotate 3, resize 2, save, verify all render

workflows_tested.task: Create detailed library prep protocol with 16 steps, full CRUD, inventory search, notebook + dashboard verification

bugs.description: duplicateDoc creates copy with empty body. fetchFile returns browser-cached (stale) version of the source file after a recent save, so the duplicate gets only frontmatter + duplication note but not the actual content. Root cause: GitHub API responses cached by browser (Cache-Control: max-age=60).
bugs.fix: Added cache: 'no-store' to fetch() calls in fetchFile() and deleteFile() SHA lookup in app/js/github-api.js

workflows_tested.task: Create daily notebook entry with extraction results, edit fast, stale data hunt (save + reload), double-click save, rapid navigation, notebook search

bugs.description: Notebook (and all pages) show stale content after save + reload. Root cause: GitHub CDN caches API responses for 60s (s-maxage=60). The browser's cache:'no-store' only prevents browser-level caching. On reload, fetchFile() GET returns the pre-edit version from CDN cache. Save itself works correctly (PUT writes data to GitHub). Fixed by adding &_t=Date.now() timestamp cache-buster to fetchFile/deleteFile URLs.
bugs.fix: Added &_t=Date.now() to fetchFile() and deleteFile() API URLs in github-api.js

observations: Notebooks page: 9 folders visible (Alex Chen has 6 subfolders, Grey Monroe, Test Person)
New Entry modal: type (daily/blank), folder dropdown with 9 options, name auto-fills today's date
Daily template: all 4 sections present (Plan for today, What I did, Results & observations, Next steps)
Toast UI WYSIWYG editor initializes correctly via startEdit()
Keyboard typing into ProseMirror WYSIWYG works (must use evaluate+focus, not elementHandle.click)
getMarkdown() captures typed content correctly (underscores get backslash-escaped — normal markdown behavior)
Save completes successfully: exits edit mode, shows 'Saved' toast, renders content locally from editor markdown
STALE DATA BUG: After save + immediate reload, rendered view shows original template without edits
Debug confirmed: save PUT sends correct content to GitHub, file on GitHub has data, but subsequent GET returns stale CDN-cached response
Double-click save: button disabled immediately after first click — no race condition (good)
Rapid navigation (protocols → inventory → dashboard → notebooks): all pages load correctly even with 300ms waits
Notebook search by slug ('qa4'): correctly filters sidebar to 1 result
Notebook search by date partial ('2026-04'): returns 5 matching entries
Dashboard shows updated notebook count (9) and recent commits from QA test
All test artifacts cleaned up from GitHub

workflows_tested.task: Inventory search + add item (double-click test), wiki full CRUD (create, edit, save, reload, double Cmd+S), edit-then-navigate-away, dashboard stats, rapid navigation

bugs.description: Inventory Add Item 'Create' button not disabled after click. Double-clicking sends two saveFile requests for the same path — first succeeds, second gets 422 SHA mismatch. Shows confusing success + error toasts simultaneously.
bugs.fix: Disable Create button and show 'Creating…' text on click in confirmAdd(). Re-enable on error.

bugs.description: No beforeunload handler when editing wiki pages in fullpage mode. Navigating away discards unsaved changes without any warning.

observations: Inventory search 'MS': 1 result (MS Basal Salt Mixture, 2 each, Chemical Cabinet)
Inventory stats: 207 total items, 9 types, 1 need more
Inventory Add Item: slug preview works ('File: qa5-test-reagent.md')

Wiki direct URL (?doc=resources/ethanol-absolute): renders correctly with type badge and connections panel
Wiki edit mode: Toast UI WYSIWYG initializes, content editable, Cancel/Save buttons visible
Wiki edit → navigate away: NO beforeunload handler — changes silently discarded
Wiki create flow: + button → modal (folder/title/type) → Create & edit → editor opens → typed content saved

bugs_found.description: duplicateDoc creates copy with empty body due to browser caching of GitHub API fetchFile response
bugs_found.fix: Added cache: 'no-store' to fetchFile() and deleteFile() in app/js/github-api.js

bugs_found.description: Notebook content lost on reload after save. GitHub CDN (s-maxage=60) serves stale API responses even with cache:'no-store' header. Save succeeds (data reaches GitHub) but subsequent fetchFile GET returns pre-edit content because CDN caches by URL. Affects all pages that save then immediately reload/re-fetch.
bugs_found.fix: Added &_t=Date.now() timestamp cache-buster to fetchFile() and deleteFile() URLs in github-api.js to force CDN cache miss on every request

bugs_found.description: Inventory Add Item Create button not disabled after click — double-clicking sends two saveFile requests for the same path, first succeeds, second gets 422 SHA mismatch.
bugs_found.fix: Disable Create button and show 'Creating…' text on click in confirmAdd(). Re-enable on error.

bugs_found.description: No beforeunload handler in wiki fullpage edit mode. Navigating away discards unsaved changes silently.

fixes_applied.description: Added cache: 'no-store' to fetch() in fetchFile() and deleteFile() SHA lookup to prevent browser from serving stale GitHub API responses after saves

Added &_t=Date.now() timestamp parameter to fetchFile() and deleteFile() GitHub API URLs. cache:'no-store' only controls browser cache; GitHub CDN uses s-maxage=60 and ignores request cache headers. The timestamp makes each URL unique, forcing a CDN cache miss.
Disable Create button on click in confirmAdd() to prevent double-click race condition. Shows 'Creating…' text. Re-enables on error.

improvements_proposed.description: Waste containers at 192 days (Paraquat Solid Waste, Paraquat Wash Waste) are approaching the 9-month (270 day) regulatory limit. The UI shows 'In Accumulation' status but no visual warning for aging containers.

Rapid page navigation (protocols → inventory → notebooks) → all pages load correctly

Wiki save + immediate reload → content persists (CDN cache-buster working)

notes: Cycle 5 complete: Kayla Torres (undergrad) + impatient modifier. Tested inventory search + add (double-click race condition found and fixed), wiki full CRUD (create via modal, edit, save, reload, double Cmd+S), no beforeunload guard on edit pages. CDN cache-buster confirmed working for wiki pages. Moving to edge_cases phase — functional coverage of protocols, notebooks, wiki, and inventory is solid.
